text:
The Great Stamp (グレイトスタンプ, Gureito Sutanpu) is the world's most ferocious pig. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 10 

Appearance

Greats Stamps are large pigs with pink skin (black in the 1999 anime) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 9 (1999) and extremely powerful snouts. They have a pair of small pointed ears and short curling tails. Their teeth are sharp and pointed, able to crush bones. 

Behavior

Known for their aggression, speed, and powerful snout, they are formidable if one does not know their weakness. They are carnivores. However, their gigantic snouts mask a soft spot on their foreheads; a blow to the soft spot can quickly kill or defeat a Great Stamp. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

To fulfill Buhara's request for roast pork, the 148 examinees rush into the Visca Forest Preserve to find a pig to roast, only to be surprised to find that the only kind of pig found is the most dangerous pig in the known world the Great Stamp. Gon, Leorio, and Kurapika manage to find a herd of Great Stamp that proceeds to charge at the trio at an incredible speed and send them flying into the air. Airborne Gon uses this to his advantage to use his fishing rod to hit the Great Stamp's weak spot on its head. 69 other examinees follow in Gon's newfound technique in beating the Great Stamps and proceed to roast the pigs' bodies and present them to a hungry Buhara, who finishes them all off. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 11 

Other Media

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Great Stamp is seen in the Forest Ruins in Midonite city. Menchi requests for her sidequest the Great Stamp Meat, a drop from the Great Stramp. 

Trivia

In the 2011 anime adaptation, Menchi and Buhara judge all of the applicant's roast pork, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 6 (2011) while in the manga and 1999 anime adaptation, Menchi requests sushi instead.
